baseline_solo.reasoning_summary: DM exhibits severe fundamental distress (negative earnings, -97% net margin, -$35.4M net loss in Q3 2024) in a macro regime requiring strict quality discipline. Price has declined 17.5% in 5 days. Wikipedia pageviews show modest attention (peak 197 on 2025-03-21, baseline ~40-50) but no corroborating news catalyst. Analyst sentiment is neutral (1 Hold rating as of 2025-03-01). Alternative data sources are either unavailable (SEC filings, GitHub, 13F ownership) or low-tier only (Wikipedia, FMP sentiment). Information integrity assessment flags uncorroborated status due to low-tier-only sources and absence of primary source confirmation. No surge-short sleeve conditions are met (no catalyst, no corroboration, no news event). No quality-long conditions are met (negative profitability, negative ROE/ROA, macro discipline forbids). Insufficient evidence and missing critical corroboration blocks (news, filing confirmation, narrative assessment) prevent confident directional decision. Fail-closed to no_trade pending upstream multi-agent analysis.

baseline_solo.reason: Insufficient evidence and missing critical corroboration blocks prevent confident short or long decision. Fundamental distress (negative earnings, -97% net margin) and macro discipline (strict_quality_and_valuation) rule out quality_long. No news catalyst, no filing confirmation, no narrative assessment, and uncorroborated alt-data (low-tier sources only) rule out surge_short. Fail-closed to no_trade pending multi-agent decomposition.

rule_engine_path: 2. Check fundamental_snapshot: net_income=-$35.4M, net_margin=-97.37%, ROE=-84.06%, ROA=-70.58% → DISQUALIFIES quality_long

decision_log: T0: Ingest evidence packet for DM at decision_timestamp 2025-03-25T09:30:00-04:00
T1: Assess macro regime: Strengthening/Moderately Restrictive (stress_score=1, DFF=4.33%) → strict_quality_and_valuation discipline applies
T2: Assess fundamental snapshot (Q3 2024, accepted 2024-10-31): revenue=$36.4M, net_income=-$35.4M, net_margin=-97.37%, ROE=-84.06%, ROA=-70.58% → SEVERE DISTRESS
T3: Assess valuation snapshot (TTM): PE=-0.494 (negative earnings), PB=0.661, EV/EBITDA=-0.867 → UNPROFITABLE, DISQUALIFIES quality_long
T4: Assess price snapshot (last_eod 2025-03-24): close=$2.27, return_5d=-17.45%, return_60d=-5.02%, volume=168k (below 20d avg 266.7k) → NEGATIVE MOMENTUM
T5: Assess news_event_summary: 0 items post-cutoff (20 dropped), polygon_news returned 0 items in 7-day window → NO CATALYST IDENTIFIED
T6: Assess narrative_price_gap_assessment: status=not_evaluated, agent_LLM_reasoning missing → CRITICAL BLOCK ABSENT
T7: Assess alternative_data_features: Wikipedia pageviews show spike (197 views on 2025-03-21, baseline 40-50) but NO CORROBORATING NEWS or FILING → UNVERIFIED ATTENTION
T8: Assess information_integrity_assessment: uncorroborated, low_tier_only sources (T3=1, T4=1), use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false → INFORMATION INTEGRITY VETO TRIPPED
T9: Assess filing_confirmation: data_unavailable (sec_edgar failed: cik_not_found) → CANNOT VERIFY RECENT EVENTS
T10: Assess sentiment_community_ownership_evidence: analyst ratings deteriorated sharply (13 analysts Nov 2024 → 1 Hold Mar 2025), ownership_positioning data_unavailable → INSUFFICIENT CORROBORATION
T11: Evaluate surge_short sleeve conditions: requires (1) catalyst, (2) corroboration, (3) news event → ALL MISSING
T12: Evaluate quality_long sleeve conditions: requires (1) profitability, (2) quality metrics, (3) macro discipline → ALL FAILED (negative earnings, negative ROE/ROA, macro forbids)

T13: Evaluate veto conditions: insufficient_evidence=true (missing narrative, filing, ownership), missing_data_persists_beyond_tolerance=true (5+ critical blocks), information_integrity_veto=true (uncorroborated, low-tier only), lookahead_safe=true (no lookahead violation)
T14: DECISION: no_trade (fail-closed due to insufficient evidence and information integrity veto); position_size_pct=0.0

T15: Rationale: Baseline solo agent cannot confidently recommend short or long without multi-agent decomposition and cross-validation. Recommend running multi-agent pipeline (Agent 02 Narrative, Agent 03 Alt-Data, Agent 04 Fundamentals, Agent 07 Risk/PM) to resolve missing blocks and confirm decision.
